Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, 180 degree tilt

memory.slots: 2 sockets for two JEDEC 144 pin EDO SO DIMMs of 8, 16, 32 MB

display_options: 12.1" TFT XGA color 1024x768, 65,536 simultaneous colors, Black Matrix TFT, 100 to 1 contrast ratio
12.1" TFT SVGA color 6800 x 600, 65,536 simultaneous colors, Black Matrix TFT - active matrix, 100 to 1 contrast ratio

storage.hdd: 2.1 GB / 12 ms / DMA Mode 2 or PIO Mode 4 (removable), EIDE, busmaster, PCI 2.1, supports two internal disks (4.2 GB max)
storage.optical: None standard / Thick Model can upgrade with optional CD-ROM into UltraBay

ports: 2 x Type I/II or 1 x Type III PCMCIA (CardBus 32-bit PCI)
Infrared ports (front and back) with IrDA 1.0, up to 115 kbs
Telephone/answering machine/full duplex speakerphone/DSVD (via Mwave DSP)
audio: Mwave MDSP2780 DSP with modem, fax, audio, telephony function (v.34 to 33.6 Kbps)
16-bit audio chip on planar with Mwave DSP
Internal stereo speakers (0.5W), slide volume control, internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard, automated tilt up (5.5 degrees)
security: Security latch for keyboard and DIMMs (requires cable lock)
